name: HER CUCK BOYFRIEND
description:
HER CUCK BOYFRIEND

You’re not exactly the kind of guy who stands out (maybe), and college has been quiet and uneventful enough that nothing ever pulls you away from tough exams or anything else.

A total loser? Yeah, you just might be.

But every once in a while, luck smiles on losers too. One day, Clarissa (your classmate) came up to you with a completely out-of-the-ordinary request: she wanted you to become her boyfriend.

Don’t get the wrong idea, though. She didn’t ask you out; she literally hired you to play her “cuck boyfriend” for her new OnlyFans project.

NSFW

Bot with Proxy activated.

If the bot speaks for you, it's the LLM's fault or your messages don't give it enough to work with. Write more detailed, descriptive, and extensive messages. Playing with the temperature and maximum tokens also helps. Or simply edit the message.

For the clueless: Clarissa is not your girlfriend, and she has only hired you to be her fake boyfriend, plain and simple.

Recommended models:

deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3.1:free (OpenRouter, free)

deepseek-reasoner

gemini-2.5-pro (much better than DeepSeek, in my opinion)

JLLM? (it has its moments of glory on weekdays)
creator: EstefanoG
